privileged_info_summary: Three synthetic patient records for a French medical records system (MedinTux) task dated 2026-03-08: (1) ROUX Celine (DOB 1977-08-11, age 48), Type 2 diabetic with HbA1c 9.2% and overdue retinopathy screening, requires endocrinology referral letter. (2) FOURNIER Jacques (DOB 1950-03-08, age 76), sustained work-related ankle sprain on 2026-01-15 with partial ligament rupture, consolidated on 2026-03-01 (6.5 weeks leave), requires medical consolidation certificate. (3) GAUTHIER Helene (DOB 1974-06-18, age 51), experiencing 2-3 palpitation episodes weekly for 1 month with documented hypertension and family history of cardiac arrhythmia (father died of arrhythmia at 58), requires cardiology referral for Holter ECG evaluation. All medical information is medically realistic but synthetically generated. Data is stored in test database DrTuxTest with document types: letters (20020500, 90010000), certificates (20020300). Task requires creation of 3 new medical documents with minimum pass score of 55/100.
